2605.06859.title: Knowledge Transfer Scaling Laws for 3D Medical Imaging
2605.06859.paper_summary: Vision foundation models are increasingly moving beyond 2D to volumetric domains such as 3D medical imaging, where unified pretraining across different imaging modalities (i.e. CT, MRI, and PET) could provide foundational models for diverse clinical tasks. However, training such models requires mixing heterogeneous imaging domains, and current mixture strategies remain largely heuristic. In this work, we observe that different medical imaging domains scale at variable rates during pretraining, and knowledge transfer between domains is strongly asymmetric: training on one domain can substantially improve another, but the reverse may be much weaker. Interestingly, both MAE reconstruction loss and cross-domain transfer follow predictable power-law trends with domain-specific behaviors. Motivated by these findings, we formulate data allocation as a scaling-law optimization problem. The derived allocations reveal an interpretable hub-and-island structure: highly transferable domains emerge as hubs that benefit many others and deserve strategic allocation, while isolated domains act as islands requiring direct investment. Empirically, transfer-aware allocation outperforms data-proportional sampling by up to 58% and generalizes well to unseen budgets with r=0.989. Downstream validation on disease classification and organ/lesion segmentation further confirms that the derived transfer-aware mixtures provide stronger pretrained representations for clinical 3D medical imaging tasks.
2605.06859.paper_summary_zh: 視覺基礎模型正日益超越2D，進入如3D醫學影像等體積領域，在這裡，不同影像模態（即CT、MRI和PET）之間的統一預訓練可以為多樣的臨床任務提供基礎模型。<lb/>然而，訓練這些模型需要混合異質影像領域，而當前的混合策略仍然主要是啟發式的。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們觀察到不同醫學影像領域在預訓練期間的擴展速率各不相同，且領域之間的知識轉移是強烈不對稱的：在一個領域上的訓練可以顯著改善另一個領域，但反之則可能效果較弱。<lb/>有趣的是，MAE重建損失和跨領域轉移遵循可預測的冪律趨勢，並具有領域特定的行為。<lb/>受到這些發現的啟發，我們將數據分配形式化為一個擴展法則優化問題。<lb/>所導出的分配揭示了一種可解釋的樞紐與孤島結構：高度可轉移的領域作為樞紐，惠及許多其他領域，並值得進行戰略性分配，而孤立的領域則作為孤島，需要直接投資。<lb/>實證結果顯示，考慮轉移的分配比數據比例抽樣的表現提高了多達58%，並且在未見預算上具有良好的泛化能力，相關係數為r=0.989。<lb/>在疾病分類和器官/病變分割的下游驗證進一步證實，所導出的考慮轉移的混合提供了更強的預訓練表示，適用於臨床3D醫學影像任務。
2605.06859.author: Ho Hin Lee et.al.
2605.06859.authors: Ho Hin Lee, Dongna Du, Chu Wang, Yuankai Huo, Shi Gu, James C. Gee, Yifan Wu
